label: Molecular Generation
description: Generates and optimizes novel drug-like molecules based on the lead compound using generative AI (ReinventMol / Graph Transformer). Outputs improved analogs with better binding affinity, selectivity, and drug-likeness scores.

defaultInputs.name: Lead Compound
defaultInputs.tooltip: Best-ranking compound from the primary bioactivity filter to use as the scaffold.

defaultInputs.name: Selectivity Data
defaultInputs.tooltip: Optional non-target bioactivity data to guide selectivity optimization.

defaultOutputs.name: SMILES
defaultOutputs.tooltip: SMILES string of the generated molecule.

defaultOutputs.name: Predicted ΔG (kcal/mol)
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Predicted binding free energy for RPS6KB1.

defaultOutputs.name: QED Score
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Quantitative Estimate of Drug-likeness (0–1, higher is better).

defaultOutputs.name: Selectivity Ratio
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Predicted IC50(RPS6KB2) / IC50(RPS6KB1) — higher values indicate better selectivity.

defaultOutputs.name: Improvement
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Summary of how this molecule improves on the lead compound.

configSchema.label: Lead Compound (SMILES or Name)
configSchema.tooltip: Input lead compound to use as scaffold for generative optimization.

configSchema.label: Generation Model
configSchema.tooltip: Generative model to use for molecule optimization.

configSchema.label: Number of Molecules
configSchema.tooltip: Number of novel molecules to generate.

configSchema.label: Optimization Goals
configSchema.tooltip: Properties to optimize during molecular generation.
